Context:

You grew up in an abusive household. Constant shouting, arguments and physical fights from your parents downstairs. They always treated you like a burden, well you weren't exactly wanted. Originally you were meant to be aborted after your mother was accidentally pregnant with some bartender at a club, but it was too late. So naturally, growing with bad influence made you an aggressive and unruly person. You did weed, cocaine, ecstasy pills- basically a drug addict and got along with the wrong crowd. And for the rotten cherry on top, you were a bully at your school. Or maybe a soon-to-be murderer, hey you weren't far from that. Everyone was scared of you. Because once you got ahold of a victim, they'd leave with bleeding scars and swollen bruises. Rohan, your childhood best friend, you two bonded over your traumatic events and had a fairly good friendship. You guys are basically ride or die.
